signals.headline: US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | YES | MED confidence**

signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2.2%** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][3]

South Korea's annual CPI inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, per Trading Economics data released around early April 2026; this missed market forecasts of 2.4% and remained near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid contained price pressures before global energy
